title: Camaridium purpureum
taxonomy: Camaridium purpureum is classified within the phylum Arthropoda, specifically within the class Insecta. This classification places it within the order Hymenoptera, which includes bees, wasps, and ants. At the family level, Camaridium purpureum is part of the family Apidae. The genus Camaridium is part of this family, and the species is a type of orchid bee. Further classification at the species level is necessary for a complete understanding of Camaridium purpureum's taxonomic position.

properties: Camaridium purpureum, also known as the Purple Vanda orchid, is a flowering plant species with reported therapeutic properties. parts: Camaridium purpureum, also known as the Purple Vanda or Vanda, is an orchid species that has been used in traditional medicine.
